security_gap.gap_description: Vulnerability in BGTIncentiveDistributor logic or proof verification allows claiming unearned/excessive incentives.

actor_risk.description: The actor could gain privileges to claim incentives/fees belonging to others or claim more than earned.

behavioral_risk.rationale: Exploiting claiming allows direct theft of user rewards.

assumptions: A vulnerability exists in the BGTIncentiveDistributor smart contract.
An attacker can exploit the vulnerability to bypass entitlement checks or claim logic.

mitigation.strategy: Conduct smart contract audits, validate claim eligibility and amounts based on verifiable proofs and state.

description: An attacker exploits a vulnerability in the BGTIncentiveDistributor contract to claim Incentive Tokens or WBERA fees they did not earn, potentially claiming another user's rewards or claiming more than their entitled amount.
